entry.data:
MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS
BREEZY
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE UPPER 60S
SOUTH WINDS 20 TO 25 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 45 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
RAIN SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING
BREEZY AND MUCH COOLER WITH LOWS IN THE MID 20S
WEST WINDS 20 TO 25 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 45 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 90 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE MORNING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY SUNNY
BLUSTERY AND MUCH COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 30S
NORTHWEST WINDS 20 TO 25 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 40 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS AROUND 16
NORTHWEST WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH
GUSTS UP TO 35 MPH IN THE EVENING

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 30S
NORTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH, BECOMING WEST IN THE AFTERNOON

MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS AROUND 30
HIGHS AROUND 60

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 40S
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S

PARTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
